ques: Search for a Specialization on Coursera about project management that is produced by a university, show a testimonial for this Specialization.
answer: The "Project Management Principles and Practices" Specialization by University of California, Irvine displays testimonials including Felipe M. (Learner since 2018): "To be able to take courses at my own pace and rhythm has been an amazing experience. I can learn whenever it fits my schedule and mood."
